children.heading: Definition of multistate and local development district or organization
children.label: a Definition of multistate and local development district or organization
A
children.text: is a planning district in existence on , that is recognized by the Economic Development Administration of the Department of Commerce; orMay 13, 2002

children.label: i
children.text: organized and operated in a manner that ensures broad-based community participation and an effective opportunity for other nonprofit groups to contribute to the development and implementation of programs in the region;

children.label: ii
children.text: a nonprofit incorporated body organized or chartered under the law of the State in which the entity is located;

children.label: iii
children.text: a nonprofit agency or instrumentality of a State or local government;

children.label: iv
children.text: a public organization established before , under State law for creation of multijurisdictional, area-wide planning organizations;May 13, 2002

children.label: v
children.text: a nonprofit agency or instrumentality of a State that was established for the purpose of assisting with multistate cooperation; or

children.label: vi
children.text: a nonprofit association or combination of bodies, agencies, and instrumentalities described in clauses (ii) through (v); and

children.label: A
children.text: inappropriately used Federal grant funds from any Federal source; or

children.label: B
children.text: appointed an officer who, during the period in which another entity inappropriately used Federal grant funds from any Federal source, was an officer of the other entity.

children.heading: Grants to multistate, local, or regional development districts and organizations
children.label: b Grants to multistate, local, or regional development districts and organizations

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Authority may make grants for administrative expenses under this section to multistate, local, and regional development districts and organizations.

children.heading: Maximum amount
children.label: A Maximum amount
children.text: The amount of any grant awarded under paragraph (1) shall not exceed 80 percent of the administrative expenses of the multistate, local, or regional development district or organization receiving the grant.

children.heading: Maximum period
children.label: B Maximum period
children.text: No grant described in paragraph (1) shall be awarded for a period greater than 3 years.

children.heading: Local share
children.label: 3 Local share
children.text: The contributions of a multistate, local, or regional development district or organization for administrative expenses may be in cash or in kind, fairly evaluated, including space, equipment, and services.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), a local development district shall operate as a lead organization serving multicounty areas in the region at the local level.

children.heading: Designation
children.label: 2 Designation
children.text: The Federal cochairperson may designate an Indian tribe or multijurisdictional organization to serve as a lead organization in such cases as the Federal cochairperson or Secretary, as appropriate, determines appropriate.
shall serve as an independent, primary resource for the Authority on issues of concern to the region;
shall advise the Authority on development of international trade;
may provide research, education, training, and other support to the Authority; and
may carry out other activities on its own behalf or on behalf of other entities.
